Curriculum ← Chapter 4

📚 Chapter 4: Additional Resources

Deep dive reading on positioning, compression, and competitive framing

📖 Deep Dives from Future of PMM

🎯
The Full-Stack Buyer
How AI is creating a new type of enterprise buyer who researches, evaluates, and decides with unprecedented speed and depth.
12 min read
 💡
Prompt Is a Workflow
Understanding how buyers structure their AI queries — and how to position your content for complex, multi-step prompts.
6 min read
 🔌
What is MCP? The Protocol Reshaping AI Integration
How the Model Context Protocol enables AI agents to query and compare enterprise software.
8 min read

📰 Relevant Daily Digests

📅
March 28: The Shortlist Wars
How vendors are adapting their positioning for AI-mediated consideration sets.
 📅
March 26: Compression Strategies
Case studies in positioning that survives AI summarization.

🔗 External Resources

📕
Obviously Awesome by April Dunford
The definitive guide to product positioning — foundational concepts that translate well to AI contexts.
Book · External
 📕
Positioning by Al Ries & Jack Trout
The classic text on positioning strategy — the "mind share" concept applies directly to AI training data.
Book · External
 ⭐
G2 Crowd
See how competitors position themselves in reviews — a key data source for AI comparison queries.
G2 · External

🛠️ Tools for Positioning Testing

🤖
ChatGPT
Test your positioning with "summarize this" and "compare X vs Y" prompts.
 🔮
Perplexity
See how real-time retrieval represents your product in comparisons.
 🎭
Claude
Test compression across different AI models with varying training data.
